client_id.description: commercetools OAuth2 client-credentials client id. Never logged.

client_secret.description: commercetools OAuth2 client-credentials client secret. Never logged.

base_url.description: commercetools API base URL, e.g. https://api.<region>.<host>.commercetools.com. Required: legacy derives this from region and host config values, but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

token_url.description: commercetools OAuth2 token endpoint, e.g. https://auth.<region>.<host>.commercetools.com/oauth/token. Required for the same reason base_url is required (see docs.md Known limits).

project_key.description: commercetools project key; every stream path is scoped to this project.

page_size.description: Records requested per page (limit query param).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
